evidence: GET /api/leader: isLeader=true, instanceId=coordinator-local-local-1772538498305, lockKey=coordinator:leader:lock. Redis TTL=23s (above 5s threshold).
GET /circuit-breaker: state=CLOSED, enabled=true, consecutiveFailures=0, timesTripped=0, cooldownRemaining=0
stream:dead-letter-queue=0, stream:forwarding-dlq=0, stream:dlq-alerts=0. Execution engine /health shows dlqLength=0, dlqAlert=false. Pipeline producing zero rejected messages.

12/19 expected streams active. Missing 7: stream:service-health, stream:service-events, stream:coordinator-events, stream:health-alerts, stream:circuit-breaker, stream:system-commands, stream:fast-lane. These are on-demand streams not yet triggered. stream:opportunities hit MAXLEN cap (100,002 entries — MAXLEN=100,000). stream:execution-requests at cap (5004 entries).
actual: 12 active; 7 missing (on-demand); 2 streams at MAXLEN cap
recommendation: Non-blocking for missing on-demand streams. Monitor MAXLEN overflow on opportunities and execution-requests.

evidence: XINFO GROUPS: last-delivered-id=1772538536639-25 (age ~1001s = 16+ minutes), entries-read=984, lag=5000 (= MAXLEN, entire current stream unread). XINFO STREAM: entries-added=86778 total, recorded-first-entry=1772539705553-11 (consumer position is BEFORE oldest retained entry). XPENDING: 7 ghost pending entries from 16+ minutes ago — their stream data has been MAXLEN-trimmed but remain in PEL. Execution engine stats: queueRejects=7, opportunitiesReceived=983 (no change in last 15+ minutes — consumer stalled). executionAttempts=922, execution-results=922 (both static for 15+ minutes).
actual: Consumer STALLED: lag=5000 (entire stream), 7 ghost PEL entries (1001s old, data trimmed), ~85794 execution requests lost to MAXLEN trimming. Execution pipeline halted after processing 984/86778 requests.
recommendation: 1) XAUTOCLAIM stream:execution-requests execution-engine-group temp-consumer 0 0-0 COUNT 10 to surface ghost entries. 2) XACK the 7 stuck IDs. 3) Investigate MAX_CONCURRENT_EXECUTIONS capacity — queueRejects=7 suggests queue saturation at startup. 4) Increase MAXLEN for execution-requests stream to give more buffer for burst processing.

evidence: Stream at MAXLEN cap: XLEN=100,002 (MAXLEN=100,000). XINFO GROUPS: pending=19, lag=175. Coordinator opportunities endpoint active: returning current opportunities. entries-read=86537, lag=175 entries unread. Stream is actively trimming oldest opportunities as new ones arrive. 86778 total execution requests produced indicates coordinator is forwarding but opportunities stream overflowing.
actual: opportunities stream at 100% capacity — trimming active. Coordinator actively processing (pending=19, reducing) but stream overflow means some opportunities lost before consumption.
recommendation: Increase MAXLEN for stream:opportunities beyond 100,000, or tune partition detection sensitivity to reduce opportunity volume. Current rate is ~86k opportunities/16min = ~90/s detection rate.

evidence: GET /api/health returns: {status, systemHealth, timestamp}. Missing required fields: 'uptime' (number), 'isLeader' (boolean). isLeader is exposed via separate /api/leader endpoint. uptime not exposed at all from coordinator. P1-P4 health schemas are valid (include status, uptime, eventsProcessed, chains). Execution engine schema valid (status, uptime, riskState, successRate). Cross-chain schema valid (status, uptime, chainsMonitored).
actual: Missing: uptime, isLeader from /api/health (by design — isLeader is on /api/leader, uptime absent)
recommendation: Either: (1) Add uptime and isLeader fields to coordinator /api/health response for schema consistency, or (2) Update monitoring documentation to reflect coordinator's dual-endpoint design.

evidence: GET /stats: simulationsPerformed=0, simulationsSkipped=922. All 922 execution attempts skipped simulation. healthyProviders=0 (no simulation providers configured). In simulation mode, all trades execute without pre-validation. No Tenderly/Alchemy/local eth_call simulation configured.
expected: Simulation validates trades before execution (or explicitly disabled)
actual: 0 simulations performed — all 922 trades executed without pre-trade validation
recommendation: For production deployment, configure at least one simulation provider. Set TENDERLY_ACCESS_TOKEN or use local eth_call simulation via SIMULATION_PROVIDER=local.

evidence: GET /probability-tracker: totalOutcomes=0, totalSuccesses=0, overallWinRate=0, uniqueKeys=0. Despite 780 successfulExecutions and 142 failedExecutions shown in /stats, the probability tracker records zero outcomes. ExecutionProbabilityTracker not wired to receive execution callbacks.
expected: Probability tracker records per-chain/DEX success rates
actual: 0 outcomes recorded — adaptive probability weighting is a no-op
recommendation: Verify execution engine calls ProbabilityTracker.recordOutcome() after each simulated execution in simulation mode. The tracker may only be wired for real-mode executions.

evidence: metrics_t0 and metrics_t1 (15s apart): pipeline_events_total=1000 (unchanged), arbitrage_execution_success_total{chain=arbitrum,strategy=simple}=149 (unchanged in both). Counter values identical between scrapes despite active stream flow. Either: (1) LatencyTracker ring buffer capped at 1000 events and not resetting, or (2) metrics export is caching the initial snapshot.
expected: Counter metrics increment between 15s scrapes when simulation is active
actual: Counters unchanged — possible metrics ring buffer cap or export stale
recommendation: Verify LatencyTracker Float64Array ring buffer behavior when it fills. Check if counters wrap or freeze at 1000.

evidence: All 13 chains connected: P1(bsc=5492ev,polygon,avalanche,fantom all connected), P2(arbitrum=12700ev,optimism,base,scroll,blast all connected), P3(ethereum=6557ev,zksync,linea all connected), P4(solana=137970ev connected). P4 pairsMonitored=0 (expected — Solana program-account detection, not EVM pair-initializer).
expected: All chains connected and receiving data
actual: All 13 chains healthy — simulation producing events for all chains
recommendation: None. P4 pairsMonitored=0 is expected per ADR-022.

evidence: riskState=NORMAL, tradingAllowed=true, positionSizeMultiplier=1, currentDrawdown=0, dailyPnLFraction=0, haltCooldownRemainingMs=null
actual: NORMAL — full position sizing active. No drawdown events.

evidence: pipeline_latency_p50=3ms, pipeline_latency_p95=3ms, pipeline_latency_p99=3ms (from /metrics). ADR-022 target: p95 < 50ms.
actual: p95=3ms — 16x better than target. Excellent hot-path performance.

evidence: Service RSS: P1=114MB, P2=55MB, P3=68MB, P4=49MB, execution-engine=51MB, cross-chain=85MB. All well below 80% of any typical allocation. Redis: used=105.44MB, peak=128MB, no maxmemory configured (unlimited). No OOM risk.
actual: All healthy — highest is P1 at 114MB (CONSTRAINED_MEMORY mode reduces allocations)

expected: No stuck bridges in simulation mode
